title: Student Affairs
content:
Student Affairs

The Registrar's Office is a unit established to carry out all relevant processes of our students throughout their education, from university admission to graduation, within the framework of the applicable law, regulations, and general legislation.

It works in harmony with academic and administrative units to ensure that education is carried out in a healthy manner, and provides necessary support services to inform students, candidates, graduates, faculty and related institutions accurately and completely, and direct them to the relevant units if necessary.

Neşe DURUKAN

Student Affairs Department Head
